hero.title: Soo Sahami Hargeysa
hero.subtitle: Waddooyin ganacsi oo taariikhi ah, soo dhoweyn diirran, iyo magaalo si degdeg ah u kobcaysa oo noqotay mid ka mid ah meelaha ugu soo jiidashada badan Geeska Afrika.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Raadi hudheello, maqaayado, goobo aad booqato…

home.destinationsSubtitle: Xaafado iyo goobo mudan in la booqdo
home.aboutTitle: Soo ogow Waxa Ugu Fiican Hargeysa
home.aboutDescription1: Go Hargeisa waa madal casri ah oo hagta dalxiiska iyo magaalada Hargeysa, Somaliland. Waxay ka caawisaa booqdayaasha iyo dadka deegaanka inay si fudud u helaan hudheello, maqaayado, kafateeriyo, goobaha dalxiiska, xarumaha wax iibsiga iyo ganacsiyada deegaanka.
home.aboutDescription2: Samee akoon bilaash ah si aad u kaydiso meelaha aad jeceshahay, u qorto faallooyin, u maamusho xogtaada, una habayso khibraddaada safarka. Gelitaanka Google waxaa loo isticmaalaa oo keliya aqoonsi ammaan ah iyo isku waafajinta xogtaada qalab kasta.
home.exploreDescription: Soo hel hudheello, maqaayado, kafateeriyo, goobaha dalxiiska iyo waayo-aragnimada gaarka ah ee Hargeysa.
home.saveDescription: Ku gal Google si ammaan ah si aad u kaydiso meelaha aad jeceshahay ugana gasho akoonkaaga qalab kasta.
home.shareDescription: La wadaag khibradahaaga adigoo qoraya faallooyin si aad uga caawiso dadka kale inay helaan meelaha ugu fiican ee Hargeysa.
home.hotelsSubtitle: Hudheello si taxaddar leh loo doortay oo ku habboon miisaaniyad kasta
home.restaurantsTitle: Halka Aad Wax Ka Cuni Karto
home.newsletterSubtitle: Hel wararkii ugu dambeeyay, dhacdooyinka iyo talooyinka safarka bishiiba mar.

footer.tagline: Hagaha aad ku kalsoon tahay ee Hargeysa — hudheello, maqaayado, kafateeriyo, dalxiis iyo wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay.
footer.rights: Xuquuqda oo dhan way xifdisan yihiin.
